name: Chicken Parmesan...prego
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Italian style dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS -- COMBINE BREAD CRUMBS AND CHEESE.
FLATTEN CHICKEN BREASTS WITH FLAT SIDE OF KNIFE TO ABOUT 1/2 INCH THICK. DIP IN EGG
THEN IN BREAD CRUMB MIXTURE. IN SKILLET, FRY CHICKEN IN OIL until browned, DRAIN ON ABSORBENT TOWELS.
PLACE IN 2 QUART SHALLOW BAKING DISH (12X8X2); TOP WITH SAUCE, SPRINKLE WITH CHEESE; COVER.
BAKE at 400°F for 20 MINUTES OR UNTIL DONE.
